content: AddItem: default price to 0, integer-only input, dynamic currency label
ItemDetail: store whole units in form (cents/100 on load, *100 on save), default 0
Marketplace.jsx: pass listing currency into fmt() calls (drop USD hardcode)
ListingDetail.jsx: remove non-functional 'Manage in My listings' button
Backend: auto-listing now inherits item's currency + computes proper fees
Backend: sync price/currency to existing listing when user edits an already-shared item
